prestazioni: Engine: 5.0L Supercharged AJ-V8 Gen III (PT204TT) with a custom Harrop HTV2650 supercharger upgrade (12psi boost, 700+ hp), paired with a forged internals kit from JE Pistons (9.5:1 compression) and Manley H-beam connecting rods for 8,000 RPM reliability. Fuel system overhaul includes dual Bosch Motorsport 044 fuel pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors, and a Motec M150 ECU with bespoke SVAutobiography-specific calibration for seamless integration with the ZF 8HP95 transmission (reflashed with a Punch Powerglide TCM tune for 0.15s faster shifts).

Exhaust: Full 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Armytrix with electronically controlled valves (bypass mode for track use), featuring a custom X-pipe design and quad 100mm titanium tips. Headers are replaced with stainless steel 1.75-inch primaries from Milltek Sport, paired with a secondary cat-delete setup using GESI high-flow metallic core catalysts for emissions compliance in key markets.

Suspension & Handling: Full KW Automotive Clubsport coilover conversion (3-way adjustable damping, 50mm wheel travel) with custom spring rates (800 lb/in front, 650 lb/in rear) and spherical bearing top mounts from Whiteline. Chassis reinforcement includes a custom-fabricated roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in) and a carbon fiber front strut brace from Cusco. Braking is upgraded to a 6-piston AP Racing CP9660 front caliper kit with 420mm two-piece rotors (J-hook slotted) and Ferodo DS3000 pads, paired with a rear 4-piston CP9661 setup and a Bosch Motorsport ABS recalibration for 30% shorter stopping distances.
estetica: Aero: Full carbon fiber widebody kit by Prior Design (PD-LR180), including extended front fenders (+50mm), rear quarter panels (+60mm), and a custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated air curtains. Rear diffuser is a custom unit by Vorsteiner with active Gurney flaps (electronically adjustable via the infotainment system). Roof is replaced with a carbon fiber panel from DMC Automotive (12kg weight savings) featuring a bespoke sunroof delete for structural rigidity.

Wheels & Stance: Forged 23-inch (front) and 24-inch (rear) custom 3-piece wheels by HRE (FF16 model) with a 10.5-inch front and 12.5-inch rear width, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 R23 front, 325/25 R24 rear). Fender flares are rolled and pulled using a custom hydraulic press setup to accommodate the staggered fitment, with a -35mm front and -40mm rear ride height achieved via KW Clubsport coilovers and custom subframe spacers from H&R.

Interior & Lighting: Full Alcantara and carbon fiber retrim by Saddleback Leather, including a custom roll cage cover with embroidered SVAutobiography script. Steering wheel is a 380mm flat-bottom unit from Momo (Prototipo model) with integrated Motec C127 dash display. Lighting is upgraded to full LED conversion by LUX Automotive, featuring adaptive laser headlights (Osram SP2000) and a custom RGB ambient lighting system with 16 individually addressable zones (synchronized with the Meridian audio system).
